idle.semantic_goal: breathing, tiny blink, ear and tail micro-motion
idle.pipeline: clean key poses -> hold/ease master -> codex sampling

running-right.semantic_goal: right-facing gait with controlled 2.5D legs and tail
running-right.pipeline: clean key poses -> 2.5D body/leg/tail rig -> 32-frame master -> codex sampling

running_phase_report.interpretation: leg/tail centers move across phases, indicating puppet gait rather than whole-image morphing

running-left.semantic_goal: left-facing mirrored gait with controlled 2.5D legs and tail

running_phase_report.interpretation: leg/tail centers move across phases, indicating puppet gait rather than whole-image morphing

waving.pipeline: clean key poses -> hold/ease master -> codex sampling

jumping.pipeline: clean proportional jump key poses -> 24-frame master -> 5-frame Codex row

failed.pipeline: full-body sad sit -> sink -> readable side-roll key poses -> 24-frame master -> 8-frame Codex row

waiting.pipeline: clean stretch key poses -> 24-frame master -> 6-frame Codex sampling

running.semantic_goal: focused working micro-motion, not directional travel
running.pipeline: clean key poses -> hold/ease master -> codex sampling

review.pipeline: clean seated observation key poses -> 16-frame master -> 6-frame Codex sampling
